subject: Fleet-update fan-out: feature priority=high
message: Iter 23 multi-batch: (1) 3 AGENTS SPAWNED in parallel via start-sinister-session.ps1 (kernel-apk + sinister-panel + showmasters); confirmed alive (3 new mintty PIDs 1276+39852+7236). Desktop .bat unchanged; relaunch from Desktop OR EVE.exe S key. (3) Quantum lane sinister-snap-api-quantum: tracker exhausted last turn; no new QPU calls until operator decision. Lane has find-optimal-triad.py + find-zzfm-qbc-triads.py + outputs/ ready when budget restored. (4) Memory: 189/191 (98.9% real entries), 9 supersedes, 13 reinforcements, sidecar daily-refreshed, overseer Distribute every 30 min, brain-decay weekly + ExportIndex daily.
rationale: Overseer auto-distributed because this fleet-update either targeted you OR mentioned your lane slug. Review + ack if actionable.
